response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time applications, with notable experience scaling engineering teams and working in high-performance environments. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of agentic AI system design, fintech infrastructure expertise, or regulatory compliance experience, which are critical for this role. His recent work at Naver on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not sufficiently detailed to confirm deep production experience.
strengths: Proven track record in scalable distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., Dunnhumby, Tencent)
Strong engineering leadership and team scaling experience (e.g., RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
Diverse technical expertise across multiple languages and frameworks, with a focus on maintainability and testing
concerns: No explicit experience with fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulated environments
Limited visible evidence of agentic AI system design or production deployment in commercial contexts
Lacks demonstrated experience with real-time credit risk modeling or algorithmic working-capital management

key_factors.factor: Fintech infrastructure or regulatory compliance background
